# usageregistry_consumer_type Data Source

Reads a registered consumer type from the DynamoDB-backed usage registry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "usageregistry_consumer_type" "repository" {
  name = "repository"
}

output "repository_type_version" {
  value = data.usageregistry_consumer_type.repository.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Consumer type name.

### Read-Only

- `annotations` (Map of String) Additional string annotations stored with the consumer type.
- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the consumer type was created.
- `id` (String) Stable consumer type identifier. Same as `name`.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the consumer type was last updated.
- `version` (Number) DynamoDB-backed consumer type version.
